requirement_topic.en: BPS / PNS Adoption or Acceptance of IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: BPS/PNS对IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933证据的采标或接受
requirement_topic.zht: BPS/PNS對IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933證據的採標或接受

summary.en: DTI-BPS is the Philippines National Standards Body and provides the official route to search or purchase Philippine National Standards. For BESS, exporters should confirm whether the project, importer, tender, insurer, or authority requires a PNS adoption of IEC 62619:2022 for industrial secondary lithium cells and batteries, an IEC 62933 electrical energy storage system standard, or direct IEC evidence. The public BPS mandatory-certification list should also be checked because it does not by itself establish a blanket whole-unit lithium BESS mandatory certification route.
summary.zh: DTI-BPS是菲律宾国家标准机构，并提供查询或购买菲律宾国家标准的官方路径。对于BESS，出口商应确认项目、进口商、招标、保险方或主管机关是否要求工业用锂二次电芯和电池IEC 62619:2022的PNS采标、电能储能系统IEC 62933标准，或直接IEC证据。还应核查BPS公开强制认证清单，因为该清单本身并不能确立整套锂电BESS的一揽子强制认证路径。
summary.zht: DTI-BPS是菲律賓國家標準機構，並提供查詢或購買菲律賓國家標準的官方路徑。對於BESS，出口商應確認項目、進口商、招標、保險方或主管機關是否要求工業用鋰二次電芯和電池IEC 62619:2022的PNS採標、電能儲能系統IEC 62933標準，或直接IEC證據。還應核查BPS公開強制認證清單，因為該清單本身並不能確立整套鋰電BESS的一攬子強制認證路徑。

standards_or_laws: PNS adoption or acceptance of IEC 62619:2022 where confirmed
PNS adoption or acceptance of IEC 62933 series where confirmed
BPS List of Products Under Mandatory Certification

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage. These GB-standard documents may support a Philippines technical file but should be mapped to the exact PNS or IEC standard requested rather than treated as automatic BPS acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池依据。这些GB-standard文件可支持菲律宾技术资料包，但应映射至被要求的具体PNS或IEC标准，而不能视为BPS自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池依據。這些GB-standard文件可支持菲律賓技術資料包，但應映射至被要求的具體PNS或IEC標準，而不能視為BPS自動接受。

gap.en: Do not ship on the assumption that a China GB report is a Philippines PNS certificate. Build a clause matrix from GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 to the requested IEC or PNS documents, identify the exact edition, laboratory accreditation, cell and module configuration, and any missing system-level evidence.
gap.zh: 不应假定中国GB报告等同于菲律宾PNS证书后直接出货。应建立从GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023到所要求IEC或PNS文件的条款矩阵，识别具体版本、实验室资质、电芯和模组配置，以及任何缺失的系统级证据。
gap.zht: 不應假定中國GB報告等同於菲律賓PNS證書後直接出貨。應建立從GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023到所要求IEC或PNS文件的條款矩陣，識別具體版本、實驗室資質、電芯和模組配置，以及任何缺失的系統級證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where a BPS technical regulation, PNS adoption, importer route, tender, insurer, authority, or contract calls up the exact evidence; otherwise IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933 evidence is a technical due-diligence or project requirement
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly used for BESS battery evidence

source.publisher: Department of Trade and Industry - Bureau of Philippine Standards (DTI-BPS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62933 as Philippines project or PNS evidence only after confirming the exact adoption, edition, and approval route with BPS, the importer, or the project reviewer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 只有在与BPS、进口商或项目审查方确认具体采标、版本和批准路径后，才应将IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933作为菲律宾项目或PNS证据处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 只有在與BPS、進口商或項目審查方確認具體採標、版本和批准路徑後，才應將IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933作為菲律賓項目或PNS證據處理。
